title: 3 IT Services Stocks to Buy From a Challenging Industry
text: Pandemic-led sluggish enterprise IT spending has clouded the outlook of the Zacks Computers - IT Services Industry. However, the solid uptake of digital remote-working solutions makes things rosy for companies like CDW, EPAM Systems (EPAM) and Nutanix (NTNX).

title: Top 5 Beaten-Down, Nasdaq-Listed Tech Stocks With Solid Upside
text: We have narrowed our search to five Nasdaq- listed technology stocks currently trading at a deep discount to their 52-week highs. These are: ABNB, FTNT, VRSN, CDW and ZS.

title: Add These 4 GARP Stocks to Your Portfolio for Maximum Returns
text: The GARP strategy helps investors gain exposure to stocks that have impressive prospects and are trading at a discount. GWW, CSL, CDW and ADP are some stocks that hold promise.
